news.t: SynthEquity(R) ETF Surpasses $100 Million AUM, Less Than Seven Months After Launch (NYSE Arca:SNTH)

holdings.infoBox: SNTH is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings.

overview.description: The MRP SynthEquity ETF (SNTH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through SPX options (S&P 500 index) and US Treasuries. The fund is designed to provide a floor against market losses, approximately 15% of every one-year rolling period. SNTH was launched on Mar 10, 2025 and is issued by Measured Risk Portfolios.

data.title: SynthEquity(R) ETF Surpasses $100 Million AUM, Less Than Seven Months After Launch (NYSE Arca:SNTH)
data.text: SAN DIEGO, CA / ACCESS Newswire / October 15, 2025 / Just Just over six months after launch, Measured Risk Portfolios is proud to announce that on 10/02/2025, its exchange-traded fund (ETF), the MRP S...
